expectedIssues: Responsible gaming icon is missing from the top nav bar
reportedIssues: Game cards in multiple sections extend past the right edge of the screen, leaving the third column visibly cut off.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game grid content near the bottom of the screen, partially covering the lower row of cards.
The top category pill navigation is clipped on the right, with the 'Hot Games' item only partially visible.
The hero carousel arrow controls are very close to the screen edges and partially blend into the banner imagery.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues mention a missing responsible gaming icon from the top nav bar; reported issues focus on layout problems with game cards, navigation clipping, and carousel arrows.
